ddls:
CREATE TABLE "artworks" (
  "artwork_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artwork */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the artwork */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the artwork (e.g., painting, sculpture, installation) */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date the artwork was created */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist who created the artwork */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution associated with the artwork */,
  "medium" TEXT /* The medium used in the artwork (e.g., oil, watercolor, charcoal) */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* The dimensions of the artwork (e.g., height, width, depth) */,
  "weight" TEXT /* The weight of the artwork (e.g., kg, lbs) */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* The date the artwork was acquired by the museum */,
  "acquisition_method" TEXT /* The method of acquisition (e.g., purchase, donation, loan) */,
  "condition" TEXT /* The current condition of the artwork (e.g., excellent, good, fair, poor) */,
  "provenance" TEXT /* A brief history of the artwork's ownership and previous locations */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the artwork */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artwork_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artworks_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artworks_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the artist */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Artist's date of birth */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Artist's date of death (if applicable) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* The nationality of the artist */,
  "education" TEXT /* The artist's educational background */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Notable awards received by the artist */,
  "influences" TEXT /* Artists or movements that influenced the artist */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the artist (e.g., email, phone) */,
  "website" TEXT /* The artist's personal website or social media links */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., Exhibition, Talk) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the event */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* The location where the event is held */,
  "description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the event */,
  "curator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the curator responsible for the event */,
  "tickets_available" INTEGER /* Number of tickets available for the event */,
  "tickets_sold" INTEGER /* Number of tickets sold for the event */,
  "registration_link" TEXT /* Link for event registration */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_curator_id FOREIGN KEY ("curator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of institution (e.g., gallery, cultural institution) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the institution */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the institution */,
  "founding_date" TEXT /* The date the institution was founded */,
  "director" TEXT /* The name of the institution's director */,
  "website" TEXT /* The institution's website */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "visitor_name" TEXT /* Name of the visitor providing feedback */,
  "artwork_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artwork being commented on */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event being commented on */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Visitor's comments */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date of feedback submission */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* A numerical rating given by the visitor (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user providing the feedback */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_artwork_id FOREIGN KEY ("artwork_id") REFERENCES artworks ("artwork_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., staff, researcher, visitor) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* The hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the access attempt (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the access log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events_artworks" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "artwork_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artwork */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id", "artwork_id")
)
